title: Croptopia & Botany Pots compat
description:
Mod adds full compatibility between Croptopia and Botany Pots for Minecraft 1.21.1 on NeoForge.

Supports all plants from the croptopia mod.
body:
Mod adds full compatibility between Croptopia and Botany Pots for Minecraft 1.21.1 on NeoForge.

Supports all plants from the croptopia mod.
